upgrade_to_elite_rides: Upgrade to Elite for Outstation & Scheduled rides
all_ride_types: Access to all available ride types
verification_required_msg: You must complete vehicle verification and selfie before proceeding. Navigation is restricted.
faq_fare_a: The fare is calculated based on distance, time, and base fare. Surge pricing may apply during high demand.
faq_cancel_q: What should I do if a rider cancels?
faq_cancel_a: If a rider cancels after you arrive or while you are on the way (after a grace period), you may receive a cancellation fee.
faq_payout_q: When do I receive my weekly payout?
faq_payout_a: Payouts are processed every Wednesday for earnings from the previous week (Mon-Sun).
faq_safety_q: How do I report a safety issue?
faq_safety_a: Tap the shield icon during a trip or go to Help > Report Safety Incident to contact our trust and safety team.
faq_multi_city_q: Can I drive in multiple cities?
faq_multi_city_a: Driving in multiple cities may require additional permits. Please contact support to check eligibility.
faq_rating_q: How do I improve my driver rating?
faq_rating_a: Maintain a clean vehicle, be polite, and drive safely. Providing a good experience encourages 5-star ratings.
faq_insurance_q: What insurance coverage do I have?
faq_insurance_a: You are covered by our commercial insurance policy while you are online and on a trip.
enable_location_settings: Please enable location services in settings.
step_2: Capture full front view of car

select_reason: Please select a reason for cancellation:
no_matching_rides: No matching rides found for this filter
try_clearing_filters: Try clearing your filters to see more rides
check_back_later: No rides found for now, please check back later.
overlap_msg: This ride overlaps with your existing accepted ride. Please check the timing.
already_accepted_error: This ride has already been accepted by another driver.
offline_banner_msg: You are currently offline. Please check your internet connection.
faq_reg_1_q: How long does document verification take?
faq_reg_1_a: It usually takes 24-48 business hours for our team to verify and approve your documents.
faq_reg_2_a: You must upload the Vehicle RC, valid Insurance, and Fitness Certificate (if applicable).
faq_reg_3_q: Can I register with a commercial license?
faq_reg_3_a: Yes, VDrive requires a valid commercial driving license for all partner drivers.
faq_earn_1_a: Payouts are processed every Monday and credited to your bank account within 2-3 business days.
faq_earn_2_q: What is the VDrive commission rate?
faq_earn_2_a: We charge a flat 15% commission on the total fare. 100% of the remaining fare is your net earning.
faq_earn_3_a: You earn a bonus for every new driver you refer who completes 50 rides in their first month.
faq_drive_1_q: What if a rider doesn't show up?
faq_drive_1_a: Wait at the pickup point for 5 minutes, then cancel using 'Rider No Show' to receive a wait fee.
faq_drive_2_q: How do I use the Emergency SOS button?
faq_drive_2_a: Tap the red SOS icon to instantly share your live location with emergency services and VDrive support.
faq_drive_3_q: Can I reject a ride request?
faq_drive_3_a: Yes, but a high rejection rate may affect your performance rating and incentive eligibility.
faq_app_1_q: My GPS location is inaccurate. How to fix?
faq_app_1_a: Ensure Location settings are 'High Accuracy' and 'Always On' for VDrive in your phone settings.
faq_app_2_q: I am not receiving any ride requests.
faq_app_2_a: Check your internet connection, ensure you are 'Online', and stay near high-demand hotspots.
faq_reg_4_q: Can I change my registered phone number?
faq_reg_4_a: Yes, please contact support from your existing number to update your profile details.
faq_earn_4_q: Are there any surge pricing benefits?
faq_earn_4_a: During high demand, surge pricing is applied, allowing you to earn more per trip.
faq_drive_4_q: What should I do in case of a vehicle breakdown?
faq_drive_4_a: Immediately inform the rider, end the trip in the app, and contact VDrive emergency support for assistance.
